functions.name: mul_bps
functions.description: Multiply `amount` by basis points (1 bps = 0.01%) using floor division.  Floor rounding ensures fees are never rounded up — the fee taker always receives ≤ the exact fractional amount. Callers can reconstruct the complementary side as `amount - fee` to guarantee `fee + remainder == amount`.  Returns `None` if the intermediate `amount * bps` overflows `i128`.

functions.name: mul_bps_round_half_up
functions.description: Multiply `amount` by basis points with round-half-up rounding.  Returns `None` on overflow.

functions.name: initialize
functions.params: env: Env, admin: Address, config: LoggingConfig
functions.description: Initialize the health data access logging contract  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `admin` - The admin address (usually the contract deployer) * `config` - Logging configuration  # Panics Panics if already initialized

functions.name: get_access_logs
functions.description: Retrieve all access logs for a specific patient  Returns a vector of all access log entries for the specified patient. Caller must be either the patient themselves or have authorization.  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `patient_id` - The patient whose logs to retrieve  # Returns Vector of AccessLogEntry items

functions.name: get_access_log_summary
functions.description: Get summary statistics for a patient's access logs  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `patient_id` - The patient whose summary to retrieve  # Returns AccessLogSummary with statistics and integrity hash

functions.name: get_unique_accessors_count
functions.description: Get the count of unique accessors for a patient  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `patient_id` - The patient to query  # Returns Number of unique addresses that have accessed this patient's data

functions.name: get_unique_accessors
functions.description: Get all unique accessors for a patient  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `patient_id` - The patient to query  # Returns Vector of all unique accessor addresses

functions.name: verify_logs_integrity
functions.description: Verify the integrity of the access logs using the rolling hash  Returns the current rolling hash which can be compared against expected values to detect tampering.  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment  # Returns The rolling hash of all access logs

functions.name: update_config
functions.description: Update the logging configuration (admin only)  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `config` - New logging configuration

functions.name: get_config
functions.description: Get the current logging configuration  # Returns The current LoggingConfig

functions.name: emergency_pause

functions.description: Transition circuit from Open -> HalfOpen to begin gradual recovery. Admin only.

functions.description: Transition circuit from HalfOpen -> Closed, resetting the failure counter. Admin only.

functions.name: initialize
functions.params: env: Env, admin: Address, config: RBACConfig
functions.description: Initialize the RBAC contract  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `admin` - The admin address (usually the contract deployer) * `config` - RBAC configuration  # Panics Panics if already initialized

functions.name: assign_role
functions.params: env: Env, address: Address, role: Role
functions.description: Assign a role to an address (admin only)  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `address` - The address to assign the role to * `role` - The role to assign  # Returns true if role was assigned, false if already had role or max roles exceeded  # Panics Panics if caller is not admin or contract not initialized

functions.name: remove_role
functions.params: env: Env, address: Address, role: Role
functions.description: Remove a role from an address (admin only)  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `address` - The address to remove the role from * `role` - The role to remove  # Returns true if role was removed, false if address didn't have that role  # Panics Panics if caller is not admin or contract not initialized

functions.name: has_role
functions.params: env: Env, address: Address, role: Role
functions.description: Check if an address has a specific role  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `address` - The address to check * `role` - The role to check for  # Returns true if address has the role, false otherwise

functions.name: get_roles
functions.description: Get all roles for an address  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `address` - The address to get roles for  # Returns Vector of roles assigned to the address

functions.name: has_any_role
functions.params: env: Env, address: Address, roles: Vec<Role>
functions.description: Check if an address has any of the specified roles  # Arguments * `env` - The contract environment * `address` - The address to check * `roles` - Vector of roles to check against  # Returns true if address has any of the specified roles

functions.name: has_all_roles
